name: Fish Tacos
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Firm Fish Fillets (red snapper, sea bass, etc.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the milk into one shallow pan and the seasoned bread crumbs into another.
2. Gently coat each fish fillet first in milk and then in breadcrumbs, ensuring it is completely coated on all sides.
3. Place the coated fillets on a baking sheet coated with nonstick vegetable spray.
4. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 10 minutes or until the fish is cooked through.
5. Warm the corn tortillas in the oven and top each with a fish fillet, cabbage slices, and tomato slices.
6. Serve with tartar sauce, salsa, and fresh cilantro if desired.
Yield: 8 tacos
One Serving ñ taco Calories: 118 Protein: 9 g Fat: 2 g Carbohydrate: 17 g Fiber: 1.7 g Cholesterol: 11 mg Sodium: 104 mg Potassium: 260 mg Exchange: 1 Starch/Bread 1 Lean Meat
